name: Sole with Lemon, Capers and Almonds
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the almonds in a small skillet and set on medium heat. Let them toast for 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Dredge the sole fillets in flour. In a large nonstick skillet, heat 1 teaspoon of olive oil over medium heat until hot. Cook half of the fish for about 2 minutes per side, or until cooked through. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Remove from the pan and keep warm while repeating with the remaining oil and fish.
3. Add the white wine to the pan and reduce by half. Stir in the lemon juice, capers, and butter until melted. Pour over the fish and garnish with almonds.
